query: JD Vance Russia Ukraine talks August 2025 concessions sanctions Kremlin outcome

mako.raw:
{"query":"JD Vance Russia Ukraine talks August 2025 concessions sanctions Kremlin outcome","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1325,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://abcnews.com/Politics/vance-russia-made-significant-concessions-ukraine/story?id=124934139","title":"Vance says Russia has made 'significant concessions' on Ukraine - ABC News","content":"The vice president said more sanctions against Russia are possible.
NATO Secretary-General Mark Rutte was in Ukraine on Friday to lay out a framework for security guarantees for Ukraine with Zelenskyy.
He added, "And the second layer has to be the security guarantees provided by Europe and the United States."
24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events"},{"url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/world/ukraine/vance-says-russia-made-significant-concessions-ukraine-talks-rcna226924","title":"Vance says Russia has made 'significant concessions' in Ukraine talks. Has it?","content":"Also on “Meet the Press” was Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov, who — while not advocating the installation of a Russian puppet — made no secret of Moscow’s belief that Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy is illegitimate.
Russia was open to Ukraine having security guarantees, Lavrov said last week — but only if the Kremlin can play a role in them, arguably rendering them useless.
Far from being a new and significant concession, Lavrov made clear that the security guarantees should be based on talks held in Istanbul, in 2022.
These are the latest machinations in Washington's attempts to halt a war Trump once told American voters he could resolve within 24 hours."},{"url":"https://www.axios.com/2025/08/24/russia-vance-concessions-ukraine","title":"Russia "made significant concessions" to Trump on Ukraine talks, Vance says","content":"President Trump has "a lot of cards left to play to apply pressure" to end the Russia-Ukraine war, Vice President JD Vance said in an interview broadcast Sunday.
"Putin is ready to meet with Zelensky, when the agenda would be ready for a summit," Lavrov said in the interview that was taped Friday.
Zelensky said Friday "the Russians are trying to do anything to avoid the meeting" because "they do not want to end the war" on Ukraine.
Zoom in: NBC's Kristen Welker asked Vance during the interview if imposing sanctions on Russia was off the table after Secretary of State Marco Rubio said last week that he doesn't believe new penalties would force Putin to accept a ceasefire."},{"url":"https://www.themoscowtimes.com/2025/08/24/vance-cites-significant-concessions-by-russia-on-ukraine-a90337","title":"Vance Cites ‘Significant Concessions’ by Russia on Ukraine - The Moscow Times","content":"In a pre-recorded interview that aired Sunday, Vance insisted Trump, who met his Russian presidential counterpart Vladimir Putin this month at an Alaska summit, has been engaged in “very aggressive, very energetic diplomacy” with both Moscow and Kyiv in a bid to find a compromise solution that would stop the killing.
And as Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov accused Western countries on Sunday of trying to “block” peace negotiations, Vance offered a more conciliatory approach to Washington's longtime adversary, saying Russia was not stringing Trump along.
“I think the Russians have made significant concessions to President Trump for the first time in three and a half years of this conflict,” Vance told NBC talk show “Meet the Press with Kristen Welker.”"}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"JD Vance Russia Ukraine talks August 2025 concessions sanctions Kremlin outcome","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.abc.net.au/news/2025-08-25/vance-says-russia-giving-concessions-ukraine-marks-independence/105691948","title":"JD Vance says Russia giving concessions as Ukraine ...","content":"Aug 24, 2025 — US Vice-President JD Vance says Russia made \"significant concessions\" to Donald Trump and rejected suggestions Moscow is slow-walking a ...Read more","score":0.73642004,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.axios.com/2025/08/24/russia-vance-concessions-ukraine","title":"Russia \"made significant concessions\" to Trump on ...","content":"Aug 24, 2025 — Russia \"made significant concessions\" to Trump on Ukraine talks, Vance says Rebecca Falconer","score":0.67758125,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/world/ukraine/vance-says-russia-made-significant-concessions-ukraine-talks-rcna226924","title":"Vance says Russia has made 'significant concessions' in Ukraine talks. Has it?","content":"# Vance says Russia has made 'significant concessions' in Ukraine talks. The Kremlin has pushed back on key subjects, including security guarantees, since the Trump-Putin summit. Faced with a stalling peace push, Vice President JD Vance said Sunday that Russia had made \"significant concessions\" in ending its war in Ukraine. Vance told NBC News' \"Meet the Press\" on Sunday that the Kremlin had been “flexible on some of their core demands” — namely recognizing “that they are not going to be able to install a puppet regime” in Kyiv, and “that there is going to be some security guarantee to the territorial integrity of Ukraine.”. That appears at odds with Russian officials, who have spent the days since the Trump-Putin summit in Alaska pushing back on both of these points. Also on “Meet the Press” was Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov, who — while not advocating the installation of a Russian puppet — made no secret of Moscow’s belief that Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy is illegitimate.","score":0.65835214,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://abcnews.com/Politics/vance-russia-made-significant-concessions-ukraine/story?id=124934139","title":"Vance says Russia has made 'significant concessions' on Ukraine - ABC News","content":"Vice President JD Vance said Sunday that Russia has made \"significant concessions\" in talks to end its war with Ukraine but didn't rule out imposing more sanctions to pressure the Kremlin toward peace. In an interview aired Sunday on NBC's \"Meet the Press,\" Vance was asked if Russia is stringing President Donald Trump along, Vance said no and said the Russians have been \"flexible\" on some of its demands. The vice president was pressed on why he believes Russia wants to pursue peace given that it has rejected the ceasefire proposal that Trump put forward and that there's no planned meeting between Russian President Vladimir Putin and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy. In a separate interview taped Friday and aired Sunday on \"Meet the Press,\" Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov was asked what he would say to U.S. lawmakers who have accused Russia of stringing Trump along, Lavrov said that Russia respects the U.S. president.","score":0.64020914,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.facebook.com/ABCNews/posts/vice-president-jd-vance-said-that-russia-has-made-significant-concessions-in-tal/1184625663524312","title":"Vice President JD Vance said that Russia has made ...","content":"Vice President JD Vance said that Russia has made \"significant concessions\" in talks to end its war with Ukraine but didn't rule out imposing ...Read more","score":0.47884622,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.62,"request_id":"60f92713-170b-46ea-9a6d-9d427ac42708"}
